calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Atty. Elizabeth Mcdonald Esq., specially appearing for the Plaintiff Bank of America.
Order waiving live testimony was filed on July 7, 2006.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Capital Partnership Inc. dba The Resource Company and Davis R. Schwartz as follows:
Principal $ 88,333.31
Prejudgment Interest $ 16,867.41
Attorney's Fees $4,287.53
Costs $461.94 for a total of $109,950.19
Judgment signed in open court.
